title.en: Spectrum Shift: The Geometry of Light

description.ko: 유리 프리즘을 통과하는 빛을 추상적으로 탐구하며, 굴절과 분산을 통해 생생한 무지개와 복잡한 기하학적 패턴을 만들어냅니다.
description.en: An abstract exploration of light passing through glass prisms, creating vibrant rainbows and intricate geometric patterns through refraction and dispersion.

prompt: A high-quality 3D render of a triangular glass prism on a dark minimalist background. A single beam of sharp white light hits the surface, refracting into a vivid, multi-colored spectrum that fans out across the scene. Cinematic lighting, caustic effects, hyper-realistic glass texture, 8k resolution, ethereal atmosphere.
